name: workflow closed-loop step describe-to-architect flows a description into the architect command input
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/workflow/closed-loop-test.sh" --step describe-to-architect --description "build a feature" --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'architect_invoked=true' out.txt && grep -q 'description=build a feature' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
